sme_leads.notes: Active on Facebook and Instagram with 2,000+ followers but no standalone website; missing out on Google local search traffic and unable to showcase services or take direct bookings.
Facebook and Instagram-only presence with no website; relies entirely on Fresha for bookings, leaving significant SEO traffic and brand credibility on the table.
Facebook-only business with zero web presence; a simple local barbershop site with pricing, gallery, and online booking would immediately improve walk-in discoverability.
Appears only in third-party directories with no owned website; a branded site would help them compete with newer barbershops opening in the Bitterne area.
Registered company operating from Shirley Road with only a Treatwell listing; a standalone website would build brand identity and drive direct bookings away from commission platforms.

linkedin_prospects.name: Kevin Ashley
linkedin_prospects.title: Branch Partner
linkedin_prospects.reason: Oversees a 15+ person residential sales team across one of Hampshire's largest independent estate agencies — CloseCoach's structured new-hire course (script memorisation, confidence-building, objection handling) would cut his onboarding ramp time and reduce the inconsistency between senior and junior negotiators.

linkedin_prospects.name: Jonathan Clegg
linkedin_prospects.title: Managing Director
linkedin_prospects.reason: Running a scaling Hunters franchise means he's regularly bringing on new negotiators who need to get up to speed fast — CloseCoach's structured onboarding course gives new hires a repeatable path from script memorisation through to confident live calls, without pulling experienced staff off their desk to babysit them.

linkedin_prospects.name: Allen Moore
linkedin_prospects.title: Sales Manager
linkedin_prospects.reason: High-value vehicle sales has a long, complex pitch cycle — new reps need to absorb a lot of product and process knowledge before they're effective on the floor. CloseCoach's structured new-hire course builds that foundation systematically (script fluency, discovery techniques, confidence under pressure) so Allen spends less time shadowing new starters and more time closing.
